title: Dell security advisory (AV26-414)
description: Between April 27 and May 3, 2026, Dell published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products:
products: APEX Cloud Platform for Red Hat OpenShift   versions prior to 03.04.04.00
Dell Automation Platform   versions prior to 2.0.0.0
Dell SmartFabric Manager   versions prior to 2.1.0
Disk Library for mainframe DLm8700/DLm2700   versions prior to 7.0.1.0
PowerProtect Cyber Recovery   versions prior to 20.1
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
